data.title: Focus Tree: Timer & Flashcards
data.description:
#1 Focus App for Students (2M+ users)
Can’t stop checking your phone when you should be studying? Focus Tree helps you stay focused, study smarter, and get better grades together.

FOCUS ANYWHERE, ANYTIME
Start a focus session and block distractions automatically.
Use study timers or Pomodoro sessions to stay consistent and productive.

STUDY SMARTER WITH FLASHCARDS
Create and review flashcards that actually stick.
Use spaced repetition to remember more and ace your exams.

STAY MOTIVATED WITH FRIENDS
Join shared gardens with classmates or friends.
Each time you focus, you add new blocks to your garden and design it your way.
Work together, track each other’s streaks, and stay accountable.

SEE REAL RESULTS
Students who focus daily with Focus Tree report higher grades, stronger habits, and less stress.

Focus Tree: study better, together.

Privacy Policy: https://focustree.app/privacy
Terms of Service: https://focustree.app/terms

data.recentChanges:
Focus Better, Together!

- Invite your friends to join your focus sessions.
- Work as a team, stay accountable, and smash your goals.
- All distractions are blocked – for you and your friends.

Focus time is better when shared. Update now and start focusing together
